message:
perf(wasm): enable relaxed SIMD, bulk memory, and sign extension features

- Enable relaxed_simd: fused multiply-add for BM25, relaxed min/max for aggregates
- Enable bulk_memory: faster memory.copy/fill for columnar data transfer
- Enable sign_ext: sign extension for packed int8/int16 column types
- All three features shipped in Chrome 114+ / V8 11.4+ (June 2023)
- Cloudflare Workers (V8 14.1) and Node 22 (V8 12.x) both support them
